title: BYO corpus record — slack
description: A Slack message. Title is optional (messages have no title). A record with `replies` becomes a thread root; each reply is served via conversations.replies and only the root shows in conversations.history.

content.description: The retrieval payload served verbatim as the body.

title.description: Document title (email subject / file name / issue title / page title).

channel.description: The channel this document belongs to (default: the source_type).

group.description: ACL group owning the channel (default: slug(container)).

visibility.description: public = org-wide, group = the container's group, private = author only.

readers.description: Explicit reader principals (emails -> users, else group ids). Overrides visibility.

meta.description: Free-form per-source structured extras merged into the record.

edited.description: {user, ts} if the message was edited.

created.description: Creation time (epoch seconds or ISO 8601). Default: synthesized from doc_id. Sets the message ts; thread replies follow at created+position.

items.description: A threaded reply — a full message that inherits the root's channel and ACL. Carries the same fields a root message can (reactions, files, subtype, edited); its time is the root's created + its position in the thread.

doc_id.description: Optional stable id for the reply.

edited.description: {user, ts} if the reply was edited.
